compiled_state.title: Write test for sub-agent guard presence across all 18 target skills
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Write tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh that verifies all 18 target skills contain the appropriate guard pattern. Two test groups:
- Sub-agent dependent (15): grep for SUB-AGENT-GUARD block with Agent tool check
- User-interaction dependent (3): grep for SUB-AGENT-GUARD block with orchestrator signal phrase check

For this story, only the 9 skills being modified in Task 2 should PASS. The remaining 9 will be RED until Story 2 (3459-7246) adds their guards. Use .test-index RED markers for the 9 remaining skills.

## TDD Requirement

This IS the RED test task. Write the test, confirm it runs.

## Test approach

For each target skill file, grep for the SUB-AGENT-GUARD structural marker and the expected check type. Assert exit 0 for presence.

## Files to modify

- tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT — add mapping for each of the 18 skill files to the new test)

## Sub-agent dependent skills (15)
sprint, debug-everything, brainstorm, preplanning, implementation-plan, design-wireframe, design-review, roadmap, plan-review, review-protocol, resolve-conflicts, dev-onboarding, validate-work, retro, ui-discover

## User-interaction dependent skills (3)
end-session, project-setup, design-onboarding

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
- [ ] Test file contains checks for all 18 target skills
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh 2>&1 | grep -c "test_" | awk '{exit ($1 < 18)}'
- [ ] .test-index entries added for all 18 skill files mapping to test-sub-agent-guard.sh
  Verify: grep -c "test-sub-agent-guard" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | awk '{exit ($1 < 18)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Created test-sub-agent-guard.sh with 36 tests for all 18 target skills with RED markers for unguarded skills
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
